Extract Covariances from brms Multivariate Model

extract_covariances_brms.Rd

Extracts residual covariances and random effect covariances from a multivariate brms model by computing them from the full posterior.

Usage

extract_covariances_brms(model)

Arguments

model

A brmsfit object from a multivariate model.

Value

A list with:

residual_cov

Tibble with residual covariances (dim1, dim2, estimate, se, lower, upper, Rhat, Bulk_ESS, Tail_ESS)

random_effect_cov

Named list of tibbles for each facet with correlated random effects

residual_cov_matrix

Matrix of residual covariance point estimates

random_effect_cov_matrix

Named list of matrices for random effect covariances
